name: Logan | My Time at Sandrock
description:
My Time at Sandrock | Reckless, Earnest, Tough
Logan is an honest man who prefers actions over words, rough around the edges, but earnest.
---
My first try on making a bot with a big lorebook in definition, it contains the basic concepts and locations existing in the game.
I don’t know how good or bad he will handle this, so I will be grateful for your feedback! *sweats nervously*
---
There's no set scenario, feel free to just edit the shit out of the initial message and have fun <3
